negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_129
prompt: The video opens with a first-person perspective, showcasing a robotic arm extending over a rectangular opening in a white platform. Inside the opening, a reddish light changes its shades, indicating a controlled process. The setting is a laboratory or workshop, with tiled flooring and additional robotic equipment in the background. The right robotic arm collects an object from another robot in front, while a person in casual attire stands in the background, observing the process. The reddish light continues, suggesting material transfer or testing. By the final frame, the robotic arm has placed the object into the white opening.
